svg.title: Flutter BLoC Clean Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: A layered architecture diagram showing Presentation, Application, Domain, and Infrastructure layers with their components and data flows.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are Widgets in Flutter BLoC architecture?')
g.text: Flutter UI components — screens, buttons, forms

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What are States in Flutter BLoC architecture?')
sendPrompt('What are Events in Flutter BLoC architecture?')
sendPrompt('What are BLoCs or Use Cases in Flutter architecture?')
g.text: Business logic — transforms events into states

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What do Repositories do in Flutter BLoC architecture?')
g.text: Coordinate data from local and remote sources

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is a Remote Data Source in Flutter?')
sendPrompt('What is a Local Data Source in Flutter?')
sendPrompt('How does the API layer connect to Flutter?')
sendPrompt('How does the local database connect to Flutter?')
sendPrompt('What local device storage is used in Flutter?')
